SQLScript:
SELECT 
   ContractNumber
  ,RunDate
  ,PaymentDate
  ,BeneficiaryID
  ,Surname
  ,FirstInitial
  ,GenderCode
  ,DateOfBirth
  ,'' AS Filler
  ,StateAndCountyCode AS StateCountyCode
  ,OutOfAreaIndicator
  ,PartAEntitlement
  ,PartBEntitlement
  ,Hospice
  ,Esrd
  ,AgedDisabledMsp
  ,'' AS Filler1
  ,'' AS Filler2
  ,NewMedicareBeneficiaryMedicaidStatusFlag
  ,LTIFlag
  ,MedicaidIndicator AS MedicaidAddOnFactorIndicator
  ,'' AS Filler3
  ,DefaultRiskFactorCode
  ,RiskAdjusterFactorA AS RiskAdjustmentFactorA
  ,RiskAdjusterFactorB AS RiskAdjustmentFactorB
  ,NumberOfPaymentAdjustmentMonthsPartA
  ,NumberOfPaymentAdjustmentMonthsPartB
  ,AdjustmentReasonCode
  ,PaymentAdjustmentStartDate
  ,PaymentAdjustmentEndDate
  ,'' AS Filler4
  ,'' AS Filler5
  ,MonthlyPaymentAdjustmentAmountRateA AS MonthlyRiskAdjustedAmountPartA
  ,MonthlyPaymentAdjustmentAmountRateB AS MonthlyRiskAdjustedAmountPartB
  ,LisPremiumSubsidy
  ,EsrdMspFlag AS ESRDMSPFlag
  ,MTMAddOn AS MedicationTherapyManagementAddOn
  ,'' AS Filler6
  ,MedicaidFullPartialNondual
  ,RiskAdjustmentAgeGroup
  ,'' AS Filler7
  ,'' AS Filler8
  ,'' AS Filler9
  ,PlanBenefitPackageID
  ,'' AS Filler10
  ,RiskAdjustmentFactorTypeCode
  ,FrailtyIndicator
  ,OriginalReasonForEntitlementCode
  ,'' AS Filler11
  ,SegmentNumber
  ,'' AS Filler12
  ,EGHPFlag
  ,PartCBasicPremiumPartAAmount
  ,PartCBasicPremiumPartBAmount
  ,RebateForPartACostSharingReduction
  ,RebateForPartBCostSharingReduction
  ,RebateForOtherPartAMandatorySupplementalBenefits
  ,RebateForOtherPartBMandatorySupplementalBenefits
  ,RebateForPartBPremiumReductionPartAAmount
  ,RebateForPartBPremiumReductionPartBAmount
  ,RebateForPartDSupplementalBenefitsPartAAmount
  ,RebateForPartDSupplementalBenefitsPartBAmount
  ,TotalPartAMAPayment
  ,TotalPartBMAPayment
  ,TotalMAPaymentAmount
  ,PartDRAFactor
  ,PartDLowIncomeIndicator
  ,PartDLowIncomeMultiplier
  ,PartDLongTermInstitutionalIndicator
  ,PartDLongTermInstitutionalMultiplier
  ,RebateForPartDBasicPremiumReduction
  ,PartDBasicPremiumAmount
  ,PartDDirectSubsidyMonthlyPaymentAmount
  ,ReinsuranceSubsidyAmount
  ,LowIncomeSubsidyCostSharingAmount
  ,TotalPartDPayment
  ,NumberOfPaymentAdjustmentMonthsPartD
  ,PACEPremiumAddOn
  ,PACECostSharingAddOn
  ,PartCFrailtyScoreFactor
  ,MSPFactor
  ,MSPReductionReductionAdjustmentAmountPartA
  ,MSPReductionReductionAdjustmentAmountPartB
  ,MedicaidDualStatusCode
  ,PartDCoverageGapDiscountAmount
  ,PartDRiskAdjustmentFactorType
  ,DefaultPartDRiskAdjustmentFactorCode
  ,PartARiskAdjustedMonthlyRateAmountForPaymentAdjustment
  ,PartBRiskAdjustedMonthlyRateAmountForPaymentAdjustment
  ,PartDDirectSubsidyMonthlyRateAmountForPaymentAdjustment
  ,CleanupID
  ,current_timestamp() AS LoadDateTime
  ,FileId
FROM MMR
